title: rhodanthemum arundanum
intro: Rhodanthemum arundanum, also known as the Andalusian marigold, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its bright yellow and orange blooms. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rhodanthemum arundanum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Rhodanthemum arundanum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
